contents.markdown:
# STATEMENT OF VALUES - Summit Outdoor Retail Co.
Named Insured Summit Outdoor Retail Co.
DBA Summit Outdoors
Mailing Address 2400 Mountain Way, Boulder, CO 80301
Effective Date 2026-10-01
Policy Period 2026-10-01 to 2027-10-01
Currency USD
Valuation Date 2026-05-20
Primary Operations Retail sale of outdoor recreation equipment, apparel, and sporting goods including firearms and ammunition at select locations.
NAICS 451110
Total Insured Value $105,200,000
Location Count 12
Broker Rocky Mountain Brokerage
Producer Contact Tyler Brennan | tbrennan@rockymtnbrokerage.example.com | (303) 555-0119
Prepared By / Date Tyler Brennan, AAI - 2026-05-15
# SCHEDULE OF LOCATIONS
Loc Address City ST Construction Occupancy / Operations Year Sq Ft Bldg $ BPP $ BI/EE $ Notes
1 2400 Mountain Way Boulder CO Joisted Masonry Flagship retail store - outdoor gear and apparel 2008 28,000 $5,400,000 $2,800,000 $1,200,000
2 1500 Pearl St Denver CO Joisted Masonry Urban retail store 2012 22,000 $4,600,000 $2,400,000 $1,100,000
3 8800 Park Meadows Dr Lone Tree CO Non-Combustible Suburban big-box retail 2015 42,000 $6,800,000 $3,600,000 $1,500,000
4 550 Main St Vail CO Joisted Masonry Resort-town outdoor retail 1998 14,000 $3,200,000 $1,800,000 $800,000
5 1200 Lincoln Way Salt Lake City UT Joisted Masonry Outdoor and ski equipment retail 2010 30,000 $5,700,000 $3,000,000 $1,300,000
6 440 Cottonwood Pkwy Park City UT Joisted Masonry Resort retail 2014 18,000 $3,800,000 $2,100,000 $950,000
7 2200 Rainier Ave Bend OR Joisted Masonry Pacific Northwest outdoor retail 2011 26,000 $5,100,000 $2,700,000 $1,200,000
8 5500 Industrial Pkwy Colorado Springs CO Non-Combustible Retail store with attached 25-lane indoor firearms range and
gunsmith services (1)		 2016 36,000 $7,400,000 $3,900,000 $2,100,000 Includes indoor shooting range - see schedule of safety equipment (1)
9 1100 University Ave Albuquerque NM Joisted Masonry Outdoor and hunting retail 2007 24,000 $4,400,000 $2,300,000 $1,000,000
10 750 Cheyenne Mountain Blvd Cheyenne WY Joisted Masonry Outdoor retail 2009 20,000 $3,800,000 $2,000,000 $900,000
Loc Address City ST Construction Occupancy / Operations Year Sq Ft Bldg $ BPP $ BI/EE $ Notes
11 330 Mountain View Rd Bozeman MT Joisted Masonry Outdoor retail - Montana flagship (2) 2003 28,000 $5,800,000 $2,900,000 $1,300,000 Building under renovation through Q3 2026; reported value reflects post-completion replacement cost (2)
12 2200 Snake River Way Idaho Falls ID Joisted Masonry Outdoor and fishing retail 2013 19,000 $3,600,000 $1,900,000 $850,000
## FOOTNOTES 1 1Location 8 includes a 25-lane indoor firearms range and gunsmith services. Range is constructed with reinforced ballistic panels per NRA Range Source Book guidelines. 2 Location 11 (Bozeman, MT) is currently under renovation through Q3 2026. Reported building value reflects post-completion replacement cost basis.
